message:
fix(polecat): clean up local and remote branches on nuke and merge (gt-qvw55)

Polecat branches were accumulating (135+ stale local, 50+ remote) because
neither nuke nor refinery merge deleted remote branches. This adds:

1. Remote branch deletion to polecat nuke flow (alongside existing local)
2. Remote branch deletion to refinery post-merge cleanup
3. New `gt polecat prune` command for bulk cleanup of stale branches
   - Uses safe deletion (git branch -d) for local branches
   - Supports --dry-run and --remote flags
   - Leverages existing PruneStaleBranches infrastructure
4. New git.ListRemoteRefs helper for querying remote branch refs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
